summary: GenStudio & Cashfree focused testing iteration. All 18 backend tests passed. CRITICAL FINDING: Image-to-Video and Video Remix backend endpoints are NOT IMPLEMENTED - frontend pages exist but API calls will fail with 404.

critical.issue: ENDPOINT NOT IMPLEMENTED - Frontend page GenStudioImageToVideo.js exists and makes API calls but backend has no route
ENDPOINT NOT IMPLEMENTED - Frontend page GenStudioVideoRemix.js exists and makes API calls but backend has no route

integration_issues.issue: UI form exists but clicking 'Animate Image' button will fail with 404 because backend endpoint doesn't exist
UI form exists but clicking 'Remix Video' button will fail with 404 because backend endpoint doesn't exist

action_items: Style Profiles: Working correctly - profiles can be created (20 credits) and images uploaded
Cashfree: Working correctly - orders created in PRODUCTION mode (cf_order_* format)
critical_code_review_comments: GenStudioImageToVideo.js makes API calls to /api/genstudio/image-to-video but this route does not exist in routes/genstudio.py
GenStudioVideoRemix.js makes API calls to /api/genstudio/video-remix but this route does not exist in routes/genstudio.py
Both frontend pages have full UI implementation (upload, consent checkbox, settings) but backend integration is missing

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All pages load correctly, UI elements present, but Image-to-Video and Video Remix will fail on submit due to missing backend

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Profile style profile during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image-to-Video and Video Remix backend endpoints are MISSING. Main agent needs to implement these endpoints before features can work.

image_to_video.implementation_notes: Should handle multipart/form-data upload, validate PNG/JPEG/WebP (max 10MB), require consent, deduct credits (base 20 + duration*4)

video_remix.implementation_notes: Should handle video upload (MP4/WebM/MOV, max 50MB), require consent, cost 12 credits
